source_provenance.primary_source: Official FIFA Match Schedule PDF v17, dated 10 April 2026 (user-provided) — dates, ET kickoff times, match numbers, groups
cross_checked: Wikipedia '2026 FIFA World Cup' (teams, venues, match numbers)
ESPN FIFA World Cup schedule (venues, ET times)
source_provenance.time_basis: FIFA publishes ALL kickoff times in Eastern Time (ET). This file provides ET (official), venue-local time, US Central/Chicago time, and UTC for every match.
source_provenance.chicago_note: Chicago is Central Time (CDT, UTC-5) during the tournament — exactly 1 hour behind ET.
source_provenance.caveat: Group-stage team assignments reflect the official Dec 2025 draw. Knockout matchups use FIFA bracket placeholders until teams qualify. Schedule marked 'subject to change' by FIFA.
